segments.speaker: 题目23/24
segments.text: Listen to an announcement at a school event. Hello, students, please come to the annual student fair this Friday and Saturday. The event lasts from 10:00a.m.until 7:00p.m.. Each day there will be booths showcasing various cultures and international street cuisine, plus stage performances of from the world. Please present your student ID for free. Entry tickets for non students are available at the gate for five. We hope you'll stay all day, each day for a fun and educational experience. Contact the event organizers with any questions.
